title: populus deltoides var. mesetae
intro: Populus deltoides var. mesetae, also known as Mesetae cottonwood, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the cottonwood tree native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its bark and leaves. The health benefits of Populus deltoides var. mesetae include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues due to its antimicrobial and antispasmodic properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, although modern uses of the plant are limited and its availability is scarce due to its rarity.
